title: Cheiro's Book of Numbers, Volumes 1–2
edition_or_version: Garden City Publishing Company edition, digitized by Google Books

license.notes: Only historical letter-value and reduction facts are encoded. No scan, prose, or modern reprint content is redistributed.

rights_review.evidence: The 1927 underlying work is public domain in the United States; production uses uncopyrightable mapping facts and project-authored explanations only.

quality.notes: Primary historical practitioner source for the selected Chaldean-style mapping, not scientific evidence and not authority for the separate modern Pythagorean label.
